mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_read (notice_id, user_id, read_status, read_at, read_ip, read_duration_seconds, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{readStatus}, #{readAt}, #{readIp}, #{readDurationSeconds}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE read_status = #{readStatus}, read_at = #{readAt}, read_ip = #{readIp}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: INSERT INTO notice_read (notice_id, user_id, read_status, read_at, read_ip, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{readStatus}, NOW(), #{readIp}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE read_status = #{readStatus}, read_at = CASE WHEN #{readStatus} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, read_ip = #{readIp}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, notice_id, user_id, read_status, read_at, read_ip, read_duration_seconds, created_at, updated_at FROM notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT n.id) FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_scope ns ON n.id = ns.notice_id LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON n.id = nr.notice_id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND n.publish_time <= NOW() AND (n.expire_time IS NULL OR n.expire_time >= NOW()) AND COALESCE(nr.read_status, 0) = 0 AND ( ns.scope_type = 'ALL' OR ns.scope_type = 'USER' AND ns.scope_id = #{userId} )

SELECT n.notice_type as type, COUNT(DISTINCT n.id) as count FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_scope ns ON n.id = ns.notice_id LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON n.id = nr.notice_id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND n.publish_time <= NOW() AND (n.expire_time IS NULL OR n.expire_time >= NOW()) AND COALESCE(nr.read_status, 0) = 0 AND ( ns.scope_type = 'ALL' OR ns.scope_type = 'USER' AND ns.scope_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY n.notice_type

SELECT n.priority, COUNT(DISTINCT n.id) as count FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_scope ns ON n.id = ns.notice_id LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON n.id = nr.notice_id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.is_deleted = 0 AND n.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND n.publish_time <= NOW() AND (n.expire_time IS NULL OR n.expire_time >= NOW()) AND COALESCE(nr.read_status, 0) = 0 AND ( ns.scope_type = 'ALL' OR ns.scope_type = 'USER' AND ns.scope_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY n.priority

SELECT n.id as noticeId, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1) as totalUsers, COALESCE(n.read_count, 0) as readUsers, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1) - COALESCE(n.read_count, 0) as unreadUsers, CASE WHEN n.read_count = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(n.read_count * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1), 2) END as readRate FROM notice n WHERE n.id = #{noticeId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice_read WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND read_status = 1

SELECT d.id as deptId, d.dept_name as deptName, COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as totalUsers, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN nr.read_status = 1 THEN u.id END) as readUsers, COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN nr.read_status = 1 THEN u.id END) as unreadUsers, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN nr.read_status = 1 THEN u.id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT u.id), 2) END as readRate FROM sys_dept d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.id = u.dept_id AND u.status = 1 LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON u.id = nr.user_id AND nr.notice_id = #{noticeId} WHERE d.status = 1 AND d.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY d.id, d.dept_name
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notice_read (notice_id, user_id, read_status, read_at, read_ip, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.noticeId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.readStatus}, #{item.readAt}, #{item.readIp}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE read_status = VALUES(read_status), read_at = VALUES(read_at), read_ip = VALUES(read_ip), updated_at = NOW()
